name: Polarion MCP Servers
what_it_does: MCP server for Polarion ALM — Siemens' Application Lifecycle Management platform used in automotive, aerospace, and safety-critical industries. Enables AI agents to query work items, manage requirements, access test management data, and interact with Polarion's ALM workflows — supporting AI-assisted requirements engineering and compliance documentation.
use_cases: Querying Polarion requirements and work items from compliance analysis agents
Accessing test management data from quality assurance agents
Managing requirements traceability from engineering documentation agents
Integrating Polarion ALM data into AI-driven safety-critical development workflows
not_for: Teams not using Polarion ALM (Siemens enterprise product)
Teams using Jira, Azure DevOps, or other ALM tools
Small teams without enterprise ALM needs
best_when: An automotive or aerospace engineering team using Polarion ALM wants AI agents to query requirements, access work items, and assist with traceability and compliance documentation workflows.
avoid_when: You don't use Polarion. Very specialized enterprise ALM tool used primarily in safety-critical industries. Community tool (peakflames) — not official Siemens integration.

auth.notes: Polarion REST API credentials required. Configure with your Polarion server URL and API token.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Polarion ALM is enterprise-priced — no free tier
pricing.notes: Polarion is a premium enterprise ALM product. MCP server is free community tool. Requires existing Polarion deployment.

known_agent_gotchas: Polarion data may be safety-critical (automotive/aerospace requirements) — human review mandatory for compliance changes
Polarion ALM has complex data model — agents need domain expertise to query effectively
Community tool — not official Siemens integration; test against your Polarion version
Enterprise licensing means this is high-stakes data — implement strict access controls
agent_readiness.security_notes: Safety-critical requirements data. API credentials. HTTPS. Enterprise access controls. ISO26262/ASPICE compliance context. Community tool accessing sensitive engineering data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Safety-critical ALM data. Enterprise access controls. API credentials. HTTPS. ISO26262/ASPICE context.
